title: wolfhsm: accept &str labels on nvm_add and key_cache
description:
## Why
Both `Client::nvm_add` and `Client::key_cache` take `label: &[u8]`. NVM labels in practice are ASCII strings (e.g. `"my-key"`). Requiring `.as_bytes()` at every call site is slightly more friction than necessary. Accepting `impl AsRef<[u8]>` (which both `&str` and `&[u8]` satisfy) would let callers pass string literals directly.

## What needs to be done
- Change `label: &[u8]` to `label: impl AsRef<[u8]>` on `nvm_add`, `nvm_overwrite`, and `key_cache`
- Add a `.as_ref()` call at the start of each function body
- Internal call sites that already pass `b"aes"` byte literals continue to work

## Acceptance criteria
- `client.nvm_add(id, 0, 0, "my-label", &data)` compiles without `.as_bytes()`
- `client.nvm_add(id, 0, 0, b"my-label", &data)` also compiles
